icon.name: App Icon
icon.aesthetic: Clean flat design app icon with bold, simple geometry
icon.default_framing: Centered, full subject visible, square format
default_constraints: No text or words in the image
Suitable for display at small sizes (64px)

illustration.name: Flat Illustration
illustration.aesthetic: Modern flat vector illustration with clean digital art aesthetic
illustration.default_framing: Centered, balanced composition with clear visual hierarchy
default_constraints: No text or words unless specified

photo.name: Photorealistic
photo.description: Photorealistic images for web/app backgrounds and hero sections
photo.aesthetic: Professional high-quality photograph, commercial photography standard
photo.default_framing: Natural composition following rule of thirds

logo.name: Logo Mark
logo.description: Clean logo marks and brand symbols
logo.aesthetic: Clean minimalist logo mark with professional brand identity feel

ui-element.name: UI Element
ui-element.description: UI components, badges, buttons, and interface elements
ui-element.aesthetic: Clean modern UI design element matching contemporary design systems
qualities: suitable for web or mobile interface

background.name: Background Pattern
background.aesthetic: Seamless background pattern or texture with subtle visual rhythm
qualities: suitable for web or mobile app background
background.default_framing: Full coverage, no focal point, edge-to-edge

hero.name: Hero Image
hero.description: Large hero/banner images for landing pages
hero.aesthetic: Professional hero banner image with dramatic visual impact
hero.default_framing: Wide panoramic, room for text overlay on one side with negative space
default_constraints: Leave negative space for text overlay

mascot.name: Mascot / Character
mascot.description: Friendly character mascots for brands and apps
mascot.aesthetic: Friendly cartoon mascot character with appealing personality
mascot.default_framing: Centered, full body visible, slight 3/4 angle for depth

3d-render.name: 3D Render
3d-render.description: 3D rendered objects with clean studio lighting
3d-render.aesthetic: Professional 3D render with studio lighting and clean shadows
3d-render.default_framing: Centered, slight angle for depth, studio backdrop

pixel-art.name: Pixel Art
pixel-art.aesthetic: Pixel art sprite in retro 16-bit video game style

emoji.name: Emoji / Sticker
emoji.aesthetic: Cute emoji sticker with bold expressive design
emoji.default_framing: Centered, circular composition, fills the frame
default_constraints: Suitable for chat sticker or emoji

splash.name: Splash Screen
splash.aesthetic: Beautiful mobile app splash screen illustration with modern gradient background
splash.default_framing: Vertical, centered subject, gradient background, space for text at top/bottom
default_constraints: Leave space for app name at top/bottom

decorative.name: Decorative Asset
decorative.description: Abstract decorative elements for compositions (patterns, textures, accents)
decorative.aesthetic: Abstract decorative graphic element, elegant and versatile
qualities: suitable as accent or texture overlay
default_constraints: Works as overlay or accent element

marketing.name: Marketing Asset
marketing.description: Marketing materials with accurate text rendering
marketing.aesthetic: Professional marketing visual with commercial polish
marketing.default_framing: Balanced layout with clear visual hierarchy
default_constraints: Text must be perfectly legible and correctly spelled

infographic.name: Infographic
infographic.aesthetic: Clean informational graphic with accurate data presentation
infographic.default_framing: Vertical or horizontal depending on content, structured layout
default_constraints: All text must be legible and correctly spelled
